evidence_interpretation: Percentiles are conditional on active nodes below the declared multiplier threshold because the candidate evidence contains violating rows only.

last_preceding_active_set_valid_state.provenance: Accepted D3A5/R4 fixed-state checkpoint reproduced exactly by the D3D prefix comparison.

onset_note: F3_release_last and the identical F4_segment_initial state both evaluate below the multiplier threshold. Therefore no positive Step-4 continuation increment is active-set-valid; the update is already required at the segment boundary after the release hold.
connected_spatial_group_method: Coincident candidates and orthogonal 0.0125 mm structured-grid neighbours are connected; groups are computed on the unique violating-node union.
endpoint_release_set_warning: Do not define the release set as every endpoint violator. Review candidates beginning at F4_segment_initial and the preceding accepted F1 state; a corrected D3D-A1 segment requires separate authorization.
